title: Language update notifications
scenario: Language update notification does not appear when app is backgrounded during firmware update on Device Settings > Language screen
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Pair and connect a supported Poly Bluetooth headset.
3. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Language.
4. Select a supported language from the list.
6. Observe the popup window and the "Software update - Three easy steps" screen with animation.
7. While the update is in progress, press the Home button or switch to another app to put the Poly Studio Mobile app in the background.
8. Check the Android notification shade for a notification.
expected: A notification showing "Device update in progress" should appear while the update is running in the background. After the update completes successfully, a notification that the device is updated should be displayed.
